infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: CalSnap needs camera access to scan your meals and estimate nutrition.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: CalSnap needs photo library access to analyze food photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: CalSnap uses your approximate location to suggest meals from your regional cuisine.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow CalSnap to access your camera to scan meals.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow CalSnap to access your photos to analyze food.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: CalSnap uses your approximate location to suggest meals from your regional cuisine.
